mapper.select: SELECT status FROM friendships WHERE requesterId = #{userId} AND addresseeId = #{friendId}
SELECT friendshipId, requesterId, addresseeId, status, notReadMessages, createdTime, updatedTime FROM friendships WHERE requesterId = #{userId} AND status = 'accepted'
SELECT friendshipId, requesterId, addresseeId, status, notReadMessages, createdTime, updatedTime FROM friendships WHERE addresseeId = #{userId} AND status = 'accepted'
mapper.update: UPDATE friendships SET notReadMessages = notReadMessages + 1 WHERE requesterId = #{requesterId} AND addresseeId = #{addresseeId}
UPDATE friendships SET notReadMessages = 0 WHERE requesterId = #{requesterId} AND addresseeId = #{addresseeId}
